name: Barbecued Pork Cream Soup B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Add ground barbecued pork and mix together.
3. Gradually add flour, stirring constantly for 4-5 minutes without allowing it to burn.
4. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, salt, and white pepper into the broth.
5. Slowly incorporate the broth into the mixture of butter and flour.
6. Gradually add milk, stirring until everything is well blended.
7. Allow the soup to simmer for 7-10 minutes.
8. Just before serving, stir in Madeira.
9. Garnish with barbecued pork strips, chopped green onions, and a splash of Madeira.
